# Golden file: containers.compose pack
format: v1
---
# D1: docker compose down -v
command: docker compose down -v
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.compose
rule: compose-down-volumes
---
# D1: docker-compose down -v
command: docker-compose down -v
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.compose
rule: compose-down-volumes
---
# D1: docker compose rm -f
command: docker compose rm -f
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.compose
rule: compose-down-volumes
---
# D1: docker-compose stop
command: docker-compose stop
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.compose
rule: compose-down-volumes
---
# Safe: compose ps
command: docker compose ps
decision: Allow
